summary: Completed testing of Manager System - 3-tier hierarchy (Admin -> Manager -> Influencer). All 16 backend tests passed. Manager login, dashboard, admin create/list APIs working correctly. Frontend Manager Dashboard and Admin Panel Manager Tab fully functional.

manager_login_api.POST /api/manager/login success: PASS - Returns manager object with id, name, email, cities, commission_percent (15%)

manager_dashboard_api.GET /api/manager/dashboard/{id} success: PASS - Returns manager info, statistics, and influencers list

admin_manager_create_api.POST /api/manager/admin/create success: PASS - Creates new manager with cities and 15% commission

admin_manager_list_api.GET /api/manager/admin/list success: PASS - Returns list of managers with statistics

frontend_manager_dashboard.Login form: PASS - Email, password inputs and login button with data-testid
frontend_manager_dashboard.Login flow: PASS - Successfully logged in as manager.berlin@bidblitz.de
frontend_manager_dashboard.Dashboard display: PASS - Shows manager name, cities (Berlin, Hamburg, München), statistics cards
frontend_manager_dashboard.Statistics cards: PASS - Shows Gesamt Influencer, Aktive Influencer, Gesamt-Umsatz, Influencer-Provisionen, Ihre Provision (15%), Ausstehende Auszahlung
frontend_manager_dashboard.Influencers section: PASS - Shows 'Ihre Influencer' table with empty state message

frontend_admin_manager_tab.Manager list: PASS - Shows 'Regionale Manager' with table of managers
frontend_admin_manager_tab.Manager data: PASS - Shows Max Mustermann (Berlin, Hamburg, München) and Test Manager (Frankfurt, Köln)

critical_code_review_comments: Manager system correctly implements 3-tier hierarchy: Admin -> Manager -> Influencer
Manager commission is correctly set to 15% of influencer earnings
Manager can manage influencers in their assigned cities (Berlin, Hamburg, München for test manager)
Admin can create, list, and manage managers through the admin panel
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_manager_system.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Manager system

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Manager Dashboard and Admin Panel Manager Tab working correctly

seed_data_creation: Manager 'Max Mustermann' already exists in database with cities Berlin, Hamburg, München. Test Manager created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manager system fully implemented and tested. Manager login at /manager, dashboard shows statistics and influencer list. Admin panel has Manager tab at /admin with ability to create/manage managers. Manager commission is 15% of influencer earnings. Test manager credentials: manager.berlin@bidblitz.de / Manager123!
